channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 8 com severidade Alta
• 9 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

💣 Grafana AI Bug Leaks Data With Zero-Click Exploit - BankInfoSecurity
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Grafana. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijgFBVV95cUxOVXBJYTVJMkFNUEJocTJYcnU1VEs5dEhJanVGZ1pwTlZyUTVZb0I2QVU5RFBCOXpsWWF0NGJqeENwY2lKZnNINkVGMVFGaFFqTllKRy1Wa2VFVkZ6RGZOMGVua0RRQzRVNF9EMk5SRG1hcm1wY2ZUSmc2bEZub3Rmb05FblNKMW9wNVhYZW9B?oc=5
 
📰 Open-Source Monitoring Platform Grafana Discovers Prompt Vulnerability, Hackers Can Induce AI Assistants to Leak Sensitive Corporate Data - AIBase
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Grafana, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiSkFVX3lxTE5Kek5QbC0xaWttUGk1ZmlYOU9xRWY0VDJ1aWItN21KcnAwOW9DNzlJQjZnVmlmdnc1US1BQ0pKVDFFeGhsZWVuN1BR?oc=5
 
📰 The Unification Dividend: Consolidating Database Operations on VMware Cloud Foundation
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the race to modernize, many enterprises have unintentionally built a “multi-platform tax.” Today, the typical IT organization manages three distinct silos: one for traditional VMs, one for modern Kubernetes containers, and yet another for fragmented, often public-cloud-based, database services. Each silo comes with its own set of tools, its own security protocols, and its …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/14/the-unification-dividend-consolidating-database-operations-on-vmware-cloud-foundation/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 ShowDoc RCE Flaw CVE-2025-0520 Actively Exploited on Unpatched Servers
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.4
Resumo:
A critical security vulnerability impacting ShowDoc, a document management and collaboration service popular in China, has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2025-0520 (aka CNVD-2020-26585), which carries a CVSS score of 9.4 out of 10.0. It relates to a case of unrestricted file upload that stems from improper validation of
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/showdoc-rce-flaw-cve-2025-0520-actively.html
 
🚨 CISA Adds 6 Known Exploited Flaws in Fortinet, Microsoft, and Adobe Software
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Monday added half a dozen security flaws to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing evidence of active exploitation. The list of vulnerabilities is as follows - CVE-2026-21643 (CVSS score: 9.1) - An SQL injection vulnerability in Fortinet FortiClient EMS that could allow an
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/cisa-adds-6-known-exploited-flaws-in.html
 
🚨 Adobe rolls out emergency fix for Acrobat, Reader zero-day flaw
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Adobe has released an emergency security update for Acrobat Reader to fix a vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-34621, that has been exploited in zero-day attacks since at least December.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/adobe-rolls-out-emergency-fix-for-acrobat-reader-zero-day-flaw/
 
📢 Check Point announces a Secure AI Advisory service to help scale AI Transformation - varindia.com
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a Check Point, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxPVGRPcS1BN2hmMlBEalNuS1hpMnpGTW5GRjBmbFk3RXBRWTc0ZTVGRFRMcXpfeUJLanAyQTdzVE81d1ZEdmNTVlNheDk3cC02bW1jMFl5OUswVHZjVWs2YndwSmt1S1VreWZtM2x6WV92a2wwVm91THN1bGcyT0o0WGhhMUNUSGJqbERrQzF5SFY3TVpBVEVjbWh3TThJOVY3aFA5aExiWmxDQnZ5dloweUE4dDVvZ0xUTFFj?oc=5
 
📰 5 Ways Zero Trust Maximizes Identity Security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Stolen credentials remain a top breach vector, often leading to unchecked privilege escalation. Specops explains how identity-first Zero Trust limits access, enforces device trust, and blocks lateral movement.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/5-ways-zero-trust-maximizes-identity-security/
 
📰 Check Point Report Flags India as APAC Ransomware Epicentre Amid Surge in Manufacturing Cyberattacks - Machine Maker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Check Point, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8174-1: XML::Parser vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that XML::Parser incorrectly handled certain multi-byte UTF-8 characters. If a user or automated system were tricked into processing specially crafted XML data, a remote attacker could use this issue to cause XML::Parser to crash, resulting in a denial of service or to possibly execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2006-10002) It was discovered that XML::Parser incorrectly handled very deep element nesting....
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8174-1
 
🚨 USN-8173-1: polkit vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that polkit incorrectly handled nested elements in XML policy files. If an administrator were tricked into installing a malicious policy file, a remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause polkit to crash, resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2025-7519) Pavel Kohout discovered that the polkit polkit-agent-helper-1 utility incorrectly handled long input. A local attacker could possibly u...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8173-1
 
🚨 USN-8172-1: kvmtool vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that kvmtool did not properly manage memory under certain circumstances. A malicious guest attacker could use this issue to cause kvmtool to crash, leading to a denial of service, or possibly execute arbitrary code on the host system. (CVE-2021-45464) It was discovered that kvmtool incorrectly handled the 9p passthrough file system. A malicious guest attacker could possibly use this issue to open sp...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8172-1
 
🚨 CVE-2026-39424 - Office
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
MaxKB is an open-source AI assistant for enterprise. In versions 2.7.1 and below, the chat export feature is vulnerable to Improper Neutralization of Formula Elements in a CSV File. When an administrator exports the application chat history to an Excel file (.xlsx) via the /admin/api/workspace/{workspace_id}/application/{application_id}/chat/export endpoint, strings starting with formula characters are written direct...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39424
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 12/04/2026 até 14/04/2026.
